items.name: voice-ring-button
items.title: Agora Voice Ring Button
items.description: A canvas-rendered voice ring button for Agora-powered realtime voice agents in Vercel and React apps.
items.docs: Install with `npx shadcn@latest add https://agora-realtime-agent.vercel.app/r/voice-ring-button.json`, then import `VoiceRingButton` and `useVoiceMeter` from your shadcn aliases. Homepage: [agora-realtime-agent.vercel.app](https://agora-realtime-agent.vercel.app/?utm_source=shadcn-registry&utm_medium=registry-item-docs&utm_campaign=agora_voice_agents). Official Agora docs: https://docs.agora.io/en/
